stable_visual_summary: A human male of Earth origin, John Carter presents as a rugged frontiersman with a mid-19th century Confederate cavalry background. His visual identity shifts from the practical, utilitarian clothing of an 1860s soldier or prospector to a more exotic warrior aesthetic characterized by Martian silks and furs acquired through combat. He lacks the typical ornamental clothing associated with other Earthmen.

personality: Capable of taming creatures through authority and kindness rather than brute force; survivor.
